description_long: This object is a directional sign consisting of a single, thick, vertical wooden post supporting a large, flat, red arrow-shaped board. The arrow is wide and points horizontally, with a pointed tip on one end and a notched tail on the other, making it highly visible for indicating direction. The post has a natural wood grain texture and appears sturdy, while the arrow board is smooth and painted in a solid, matte red color. There are no visible fasteners or text on the sign, and the construction suggests it is designed for outdoor use. The sign is simple and functional, intended to provide clear directional guidance in public spaces. Its size and materials indicate it is meant to be seen from a distance and withstand various weather conditions.
description: A large, red arrow-shaped directional sign mounted on a thick wooden post, designed for clear visibility and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden post and the edge of the red arrow board.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full red arrow shape and the width of the sign, with the post centered behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the post's thickness and the edge of the arrow board.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the red arrow and the wooden post, with the arrow's tail visible.
